texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Balloon flight over the Maasai Mara - US$505 for adults and US$400 per child 4 - 11 years (children below 4 years not allowed). PLEASE NOTE and tell your guests: The day begins with an early morning wakeup call at 3.30am with tea and coffee followed by a 4am departure to the launch site to enjoy balloon safari over the Maasai Mara. The drive from camp to the balloon site takes about 1.5 hours
texts.text: Balloon flight over the Maasai Mara - US$505 for adults and US$400 per child 4 - 11 years (children below 4 years not allowed). PLEASE NOTE and tell your guests: The day begins with an early morning wakeup call at 3.30am with tea and coffee followed by a 4am departure to the launch site to enjoy balloon safari over the Maasai Mara. texts.label: text
texts.orig: Airlines landing at Cottar's Private Airstrip S 01°43.16; E 35°20.38 on a scheduled routing. Please note that there is a minimum number of passengers that need to fly for the following airlines to land at our airstrip:
texts.text: Airlines landing at Cottar's Private Airstrip S 01°43.16; E 35°20.38 on a scheduled routing. Please note that there is a minimum number of passengers that need to fly for the following airlines to land at our airstrip:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Safarilink Aviation - 4 pax and above (unless using a Dash or have more that 3 stops per route)
texts.text: Safarilink Aviation - 4 pax and above (unless using a Dash or have more that 3 stops per route)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Airkenya Aviation - 4 pax and above (unless using a Dash or have more that 3 stops per route)
texts.text: Airkenya Aviation - 4 pax and above (unless using a Dash or have more that 3 stops per route)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Governor's Aviation - 2 pax and above (unless using a Dash or have more that 3 stops per route)
texts.text: Governor's Aviation - 2 pax and above (unless using a Dash or have more that 3 stops per route)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: NOTE: It has come to our attention that even with the above agreements in place, these flight companies do not always follow the agreement and flight times can sometimes be half an hour early or an hour later than scheduled.
texts.text: NOTE: It has come to our attention that even with the above agreements in place, these flight companies do not always follow the agreement and flight times can sometimes be half an hour early or an hour later than scheduled.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Scenic Air, Yellow Wings and any private charter company will also land at our private airstrip. Please make sure to specify that the clients should be landing at Cottar's Private Airstrip when making a booking. Cottar's Private Airstrip is only a 15 minute drive from all of Cottar's Safaris properties. Keekorok airstrip is a 2 hour drive.
texts.text: Scenic Air, Yellow Wings and any private charter company will also land at our private airstrip. Please make sure to specify that the clients should be landing at Cottar's Private Airstrip when making a booking. Cottar's Private Airstrip is only a 15 minute drive from all of Cottar's Safaris properties. Keekorok airstrip is a 2 hour drive.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: *Please note that we will not be charging single travellers being collected from Keekorok Airstrip when airlines will not drop them at Cottar's Private Airstrip because of this restriction or if there is an unavoidable issue subject to prior confirmation.

texts.orig: Please note that whenever possible we do try our best to give each group of guests exclusive use of a vehicle but this cannot be guaranteed unless a fee of $330 per day is paid when booking. We would highly recommend booking exclusive use of a vehicle in our High and Peak Seasons.
texts.text: Please note that whenever possible we do try our best to give each group of guests exclusive use of a vehicle but this cannot be guaranteed unless a fee of $330 per day is paid when booking. We would highly recommend booking exclusive use of a vehicle in our High and Peak Seasons.

texts.orig: Charged $100 per night; this excludes park & conservancy fees.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: FAM TRIPS
texts.text: FAM TRIPS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We welcome and value the necessity of familiarisation (FAM) trips to our properties. Please let us know when you intend to visit and we will send you our agent rate and terms and conditions. Send your request to marketing@cottarssafaris.com . Please note that we do not accept FAM trips during the following months: June, July, August, September, December and the beginning of January.

Please note that we do not accept FAM trips during the following months: June, July, August, September, December and the beginning of January.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: ROOMING
texts.text: ROOMING

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Please note that we will always do our best to provide you with your specific rooming requests but we cannot always guarantee this. Please understand that the tents and rooms are all slightly different and have unique layouts and views. We do have options for additional beds that can be added to some of the tents/rooms. Details like this can be ironed out during the booking process.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: HIGHLIGHTS OF BOOKING TERMS & CONDITIONS
texts.text: HIGHLIGHTS OF BOOKING TERMS & CONDITIONS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The below are of the salient terms and conditions, however please refer to our full terms and conditions here for all the information. Our full and detailed Terms & Conditions (sent separately) are to be read, agreed to and returned to us before you may proceed with booking any of our properties.Please contact bookings@cottarssafaris.com to receive our Terms and Conditions.
texts.text: The below are of the salient terms and conditions, however please refer to our full terms and conditions here for all the information. Our full and detailed Terms & Conditions (sent separately) are to be read, agreed to and returned to us before you may proceed with booking any of our properties.Please contact bookings@cottarssafaris.com to receive our Terms and Conditions.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: MAKING A BOOKING
texts.text: MAKING A BOOKING

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We will accept provisional bookings however these will be held for a maximum of ten calendar days unless an extension has been requested for in writing and has been approved in writing by Cottar's Safaris. This extension will only be for a maximum of another ten calendar days. Any extension of any provisional period will, however, at all times remain the sole and unfettered discretion of Cottar's Safaris. Bookings will be considered confirmed ONLY when a deposit of 20% of the total safari value has been received by Cottar's Safaris. Please note that until a 20% deposit is received upon expiry of the provisional booking, Cottar's Safaris has every right to release the rooms. All bookings are non-transferable. By confirming a booking you are entering into a contract with Cottar's Safaris and therefore are bound by our FULL terms and conditions.
texts.text: We will accept provisional bookings however these will be held for a maximum of ten calendar days unless an extension has been requested for in writing and has been approved in writing by Cottar's Safaris. This extension will only be for a maximum of another ten calendar days. Any extension of any provisional period will, however, at all times remain the sole and unfettered discretion of Cottar's Safaris. Bookings will be considered confirmed ONLY when a deposit of 20% of the total safari value has been received by Cottar's Safaris. Please note that until a 20% deposit is received upon expiry of the provisional booking, Cottar's Safaris has every right to release the rooms. All bookings are non-transferable. By confirming a booking you are entering into a contract with Cottar's Safaris and therefore are bound by our FULL terms and conditions.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: AGENT RESPONSIBILITY
texts.text: AGENT RESPONSIBILITY

texts.label: text
texts.orig: By confirming a booking with Cottar's Safaris, the agent takes full responsibility for the booking whether financial or otherwise on the guests' behalf and confirms that the information provided to the guest and to Cottar's Safaris is true, accurate and complete.
texts.text: By confirming a booking with Cottar's Safaris, the agent takes full responsibility for the booking whether financial or otherwise on the guests' behalf and confirms that the information provided to the guest and to Cottar's Safaris is true, accurate and complete.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: PAYMENT
texts.text: PAYMENT

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Full and final payment must be received in full and cleared funds by Cottar's Safaris no later than 60 days before the arrival date under the booking (or if the booking is within 60 days, immediately upon booking). If final payment is not received, then Cottar's Safaris is entitled to release the rooms and any other services with no further liability to it. In such circumstances the deposit will not be refunded to you and any reimbursement of payment received will be dealt with in accordance with the section on 'Cancellation' below. If clients arrive without full payment being made in advance, Cottar's Safaris have the rights to either not accept the clients or charge them directly the difference in order for their stay to be effected.
texts.text: Full and final payment must be received in full and cleared funds by Cottar's Safaris no later than 60 days before the arrival date under the booking (or if the booking is within 60 days, immediately upon booking). If final payment is not received, then Cottar's Safaris is entitled to release the rooms and any other services with no further liability to it. In such circumstances the deposit will not be refunded to you and any reimbursement of payment received will be dealt with in accordance with the section on 'Cancellation' below. If clients arrive without full payment being made in advance, Cottar's Safaris have the rights to either not accept the clients or charge them directly the difference in order for their stay to be effected.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CANCELLATION
texts.text: CANCELLATION

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A cancellation must be made in writing via email to bookings@cottarssafaris.com and receipt of the cancellation must also be confirmed in writing by Cottar's Safaris. If there is no acknowledgment of the cancellation from Cottar's Safaris it means that your cancellation notification has not been received and is therefore not valid. We will use reasonable efforts to respond to emails on time but please ensure that you follow up on any cancellation notification. In the event of a valid cancellation notification, the following terms will apply (subject to the Disclaimer and Force Majeure clauses in our full terms and conditions and the Covid-19 addendum included with these terms):
texts.text: A cancellation must be made in writing via email to bookings@cottarssafaris.com and receipt of the cancellation must also be confirmed in writing by Cottar's Safaris. If there is no acknowledgment of the cancellation from Cottar's Safaris it means that your cancellation notification has not been received and is therefore not valid. We will use reasonable efforts to respond to emails on time but please ensure that you follow up on any cancellation notification. In the event of a valid cancellation notification, the following terms will apply (subject to the Disclaimer and Force Majeure clauses in our full terms and conditions and the Covid-19 addendum included with these terms):

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  More than 60 days before arrival, the 20% deposit is refunded, net of bank/payment transaction/currency exchange charges and an admin fee of 3% of the booking value.
texts.text: More than 60 days before arrival, the 20% deposit is refunded, net of bank/payment transaction/currency exchange charges and an admin fee of 3% of the booking value.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Between 60 days and arrival, 100% of the total invoice value is forfeited
texts.text: Between 60 days and arrival, 100% of the total invoice value is forfeited

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Cancellation during travel or stay - 100% of total invoice value is forfeited
texts.text: Cancellation during travel or stay - 100% of total invoice value is forfeited

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: INSURANCE
texts.text: INSURANCE

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Cottar's Safaris will not accept guests on a tour unless full travel and medical insurance has been taken out by the guest or on behalf of the guest. Insurance should be arranged when the initial deposit is paid and details provided. If a guest does not have full travel and medical insurance Cottar's Safaris is entitled to cancel the booking and cancellation fees will apply accordingly.
texts.text: Cottar's Safaris will not accept guests on a tour unless full travel and medical insurance has been taken out by the guest or on behalf of the guest. Insurance should be arranged when the initial deposit is paid and details provided. If a guest does not have full travel and medical insurance Cottar's Safaris is entitled to cancel the booking and cancellation fees will apply accordingly.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Cottar's Safaris full Terms and Conditions must be read, agreed to and returned to Cottar's Safaris for these rates to be valid and for you to be able to book any of the Cottar's Safaris properties.
texts.text: Cottar's Safaris full Terms and Conditions must be read, agreed to and returned to Cottar's Safaris for these rates to be valid and for you to be able to book any of the Cottar's Safaris properties.

texts.orig: Please contact Liz at bookings@cottarssafaris.com to receive our full Terms and Conditions.
